contact.address: 324 Santa Rosa Ave, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

hero.heading: Ink, piercings, and a little sparkle.
hero.subheading: Santa Rosa's female-owned, locally loved tattoo and body-piercing studio since 1997 — custom tattoos, expert piercings, and tooth gems, walk-ins welcome.

images.heroAlt: The Hole Thing tattoo and piercing studio in Santa Rosa

about.heading: Sonoma County's studio since 1997
body: The Hole Thing has been Santa Rosa's female-owned home for tattoos and piercings since 1997, settling into our Santa Rosa Avenue studio in 2005. Two-plus decades in, we're proud to be a name locals trust — and to have been voted Best of North Bay year after year.

Our owner is one of the industry's most experienced piercers, with 20+ years behind the needle, alongside a roster of tattoo artists whose portfolios you're welcome to browse. Walk-ins are always welcome, consultations are free, and yes — we're family-friendly and happy to do little ones' ear piercings too.

services.title: Custom tattoos
services.description: Original work and walk-ins from artists with portfolios you can browse first — free consultations, any time.

services.title: Body piercing
services.description: Ears, septum, and everything beyond — done by one of the North Bay's most experienced piercers, 20+ years in.

services.title: Tooth gems
services.description: A quick, painless little sparkle — Sonoma County's go-to spot for tooth gems.

services.title: Kids' & first piercings
services.description: Family-friendly and gentle with first-timers, so little ones (and nervous grown-ups) are in good hands.

hoursNote: Walk-ins welcome — call ahead for the artist you want.
